extension.summary: Stream free movies with a subscription passcode
extension.description:
MovieHub is a Kodi video addon that lets you browse and stream a curated catalogue of movies and web series. Access is protected by a 4-digit subscription passcode that is linked to a single device, so each code works on only one Kodi installation.
Features: - Search, Latest, Genres and Categories browsing - Automatic link and file detection - Built-in universal resolver for common file hosts - Quality selection and source picking - inputstream.adaptive support for HLS (m3u8)
extension.disclaimer: Streaming copyrighted content may be illegal in your country. Use at your own risk. For personal use only.
